---
title: "Matthew Mair"
---

::: {.column-page}

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
![](pics/Nutshell_Zoomed.png){.profile-photo}
:::

::: {.g-col-8}

## About Me

I am a Ph.D. student in the Department of Agricultural and Applied Economics at Virginia Tech and an Interfaces of Global Change fellow at the Global Change Center. My research sits at the intersection of environmental economics, machine learning, and policy analysis, with a focus on understanding how human decision-making shapes environmental outcomes.

**Fields:** Environmental and Energy Economics, Applied Econometrics, Machine Learning

**Email:** [mairmc@vt.edu](mailto:mairmc@vt.edu)

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=G5DCnmYAAAAJ&hl=en) | [GitHub](https://github.com/MatthewMair42)

:::

:::

:::
